steps.title: Keep the comparison parallel
steps.content: The sentence compares the highest count for combtooth blenny with the highest count for yellowtail sergeant. The blank must give the yellowtail sergeant's maximum count and month from the graph.

steps.title: Reject incorrect readings
steps.content:
• Choice A gives a count far above the yellowtail sergeant's graph values.
  • Choice B gives the wrong count and month for the maximum.
  • Choice C gives a January value that is too high.

steps.title: Use the peak value
steps.content: The graph shows the yellowtail sergeant's highest count as 3 individuals in January of 2001, preserving the contrast with 62. The answer is D.
